---
title: "Missing bibliography file"
bibliography: does-not-exist.bib
execute:
  enabled: false
---

# Heading

Some prose citing @smith2020 referencing a bibliography file that is absent.

<!--
This fixture intentionally names a `bibliography:` file that does not exist, so
`quarto render` fails (exit 1) — that is expected and fine. The citation
integration test never renders it; it only opens it and queries the completion
provider (environment-independent, no CLI), to verify that a missing bib yields
no citekeys and does not break completion. Analogous to `render-error.qmd`.
-->
